总评价：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669406834,"group_id":"7111202339658140704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8YYfVkGLItLBg9nLOTKdfcHwaLJgMjQVl8P7yxP+UYl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4ccfa79e029c4661ae41cf6f5b90568b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875260&x-signature=VCtvzf%2BNzOJDT4C3xjwkxp5pN1g%3D","user_id":"2243423786766723","user_name":"七月星海"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2243423786766723","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7111202339658140704","book_info":{"abstract":"【诸天万界】【幕后】【系统】【群像】【本书又名：诸天万界：都是我的打工人】
剑与魔法世界、末日废土世界、神魔世界、星际世界……无数的世界之中，随机抽选，顺便选取一位打工...天选之人，给予系统！作为所有天选之人背后的金手指老爷爷！（划掉）老板！
死掉的唐子恒发现自己存在于虚空之中，获得了系统，为了变强和复活，他走上了一条让诸天万界给他打工的道路。
